subcodes.first_line: Glorified is He Who hath revealed His own Self unto His Self, and Who remaineth sanctified in the heights of His inaccessibility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی تجلی لذاته بذاته و تنزه فی علو امتناعه
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @justice and wrath of God, @prayer for the Babis; people of the Bayan, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat], @power of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
